title: Cozy Cabincore - C3
description: Redwoods, flowers, cabin logs, and more!
body: This mod adds a new type of tree to the Old Growth Forests, the Redwood. Redwood and Spruce will now drop Pine Sap, which can be combined with a Bottle of Honey to make a Bottle of Sticky Pitch. Pitch is used to make Cabin Logs. Several other new decorative blocks and plants can be found and created, such as new flowers in both Old Growth Forests and Birch Forests, or planks which can be made from Bark.
